パッケージ nodagumi.ananPJ.misc

インタフェース Trail.Content

  • 既知の実装クラスのリスト:
    AgentBase, AwaitAgent, BustleAgent, CapriciousAgent, MapArea, MapAreaRectangle, MapLink, MapNode, MapPartGroup, MapPolygon, NaiveAgent, OBMapPart, OBNode, OBNodeSymbolicLink, Place.TrailPlaceContent, Place.TrailPlaceContentWithAux, RationalAgent, RubyAgent, Trail.ContentMessage, Trail.ContentObject, WalkAgent
    含まれているクラス:
    Trail
    public static interface Trail.Content
    Content of Trail. should have method getJsonObject().

    • メソッドの概要

      すべてのメソッド インスタンス・メソッド abstractメソッド 
      修飾子とタイプ メソッド 説明
      java.lang.Object getJsonObject()
      return a Number, a String, a Map, a List, or an Object that can be translated to JSON.

    • メソッドの詳細

      • getJsonObject

        java.lang.Object getJsonObject()
        return a Number, a String, a Map, a List, or an Object that can be translated to JSON. In the case of Number or String, it will be translated to the value. In the case of a List, it will be translated to a JSON array. In the case of a Map, it will be traslated to a JSON object. In the case of an Object, it will be traslated to a JSON object, which consists of pair of name and value of public field.
